content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/news/thawing-permafrost-could-leach-microbes-chemicals-into-environment/", "source_title": "Thawing Permafrost Could Leach Microbes, Chemicals Into ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "That\u2019s roughly 51 times the amount of carbon the world released as fossil fuel emissions in 2019.", "direct_quote": "That\u2019s roughly 51 times the amount of carbon the world released as fossil fuel emissions in 2019.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "While the review paper found that Earth\u2019s polar regions are warming the fastest, it was less conclusive on how increased carbon emissions co...", "direct_quote": "While the review paper found that Earth\u2019s polar regions are warming the fastest, it was less conclusive on how increased carbon emissions could drive drier or wetter conditions in the Arctic.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Ground and airborne measurements focus on the specific time they were collected, whereas satellites constantly monitor Earth \u2013 although they...", "direct_quote": "Ground and airborne measurements focus on the specific time they were collected, whereas satellites constantly monitor Earth \u2013 although they can be limited by things such as cloud cover, the time of day, or the eventual end of a satellite mission.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
